fields.name: form-title
fields.label: Form Title
fields.description: Heading displayed at the top of the form

fields.name: redirectUrl
fields.label: Redirect URL
fields.description: Page to redirect to after successful form submission. Leave empty for no redirect.

fields.name: started-event-type
fields.label: Started Event Type
fields.description: Launch/Analytics event fired when the form wizard starts

fields.name: step-event-type
fields.label: Step Event Type
fields.description: Launch/Analytics event fired on each wizard step advance

fields.name: abandoned-event-type
fields.label: Abandoned Event Type
fields.description: Launch/Analytics event fired when user leaves without submitting

fields.name: buttondata
fields.label: Button Data Sheet
fields.description: AEM sheet path whose key/value rows are sent on submit

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block
